title: Scary mod
description: The all brand new spanking mod for the younger generations, for ones who want the thriller, horror, and even spookyness!
body:
![Scary mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85a94149a297b2168cb556712e1ab66317f10b29.png) 
# **ABOUT:**
This Scary Mod is a jokey mod that doesn't have anything remotely scary or horror like in it, but this seemingly "frightenly" Scary Mod makes up for it by having new tools, items, and blocks that can do destruction or do the opposite  

# **FEATURES:**
The Scary Mod adds
- Scary tools
- A new scary disc
- One new structure
- Scary ball
- Scary water
- Many new recipes
- The payload from team fortress two
- The eyelander from team fortress two
- Many new achievements to find

**AND SO MUCH MORE**
